summary: Iteration 2 latency-sensitive smoke test for FFM Production Skill Matrix v2 (row_name/priority/run_count/absent/adjust/analytics/shift/export). All critical backend endpoints and frontend flows verified against the public preview URL.
passed: GET /api/lines returns 15 lines AND row_names array of 16
GET /api/details returns 72 rows, all with non-empty row_name
POST /api/schedule with X-Smart(run 2) + E2 returns line_keys [E2, X-Smart, X-Smart #2] and ZERO person overlap between X-Smart and X-Smart #2
Priority ordering: with restricted pool (~10 persons), X-Smart pri=1 got 8 slots vs E2 pri=5 got 1 -> lower priority filled first
POST /api/schedule/{date}/adjust action=set with cell_key='p&c assembly||X-Smart' swaps persons and removes them from other cell (E2 pc lost the two swapped ids); overrides map populated
POST /api/schedule/{date}/adjust action=clear returns unassigned_keys=['sub assembly - 1||E2'] and that cell has empty assigned_person_ids
GET /api/analytics/shortage returns {top_short_details, top_short_lines, history} arrays populated
GET /api/schedule/{date}?shift=day and ?shift=evening return DIFFERENT document ids (upsert key includes shift)

Frontend Setup: 15 line rows, testids line-priority/run-plus/minus/count/enable-<line> all present; setup-shift-select and setup-date-input present; generate-schedule-btn navigates to /board?date=...&shift=day

Frontend Board: col-header-X-Smart and col-header-'X-Smart #2' present, absent-row-label + absent-row-cell present, ROW NAME column on LEFT, run_count expansion visible (X-Smart, X-Smart #2, X-Smart #3)
Frontend Board: clicking populated cell opens edit-cell-dialog with 47 pick-cb-* checkboxes, edit-save-btn, edit-clear-btn, edit-cancel-btn all present
Frontend Board: tv-mode-btn, print-btn, export-xlsx-btn present; export href = /api/export/2026-03-20?shift=day (correct)
Frontend Analytics page loads and contains 'Shortage' section text
Frontend History page: history-prev-month, history-next-month present; 31 cal-cell-<iso> cells rendered
Zero console errors on frontend during navigation
notes: Adjust endpoint payload uses cell_key='row_name||line_key' + shift in JSON body (NOT query param). Frontend already uses this contract correctly.
setup-shift-select is a custom (non-native) select; native page.select_option() failed but the element exists and works via UI click. Not a bug.
